description: Human geographers explore socio-spacial relations, processes and representations of the world in which we live. Engages economic, political, urban, socio-cultural and environmental geographic perspectives to investigate patterns and processes that have come to be associated with 'globalization'.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Not open to students with credit forGEOG 101

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Not open to students with credit forGEOG 101
